Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: A rough tackle halts a beach gridiron game. Harrison deals with bluebottles and a rat in the skate bowl.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 06

Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards rescue a surfer being smashed against cliffs. Drunk Irishmen dance in tutus and frolic in the nude.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jethro takes on the toughest rescue of his career so far. Waves swamp the lifeguard 4WD buggy.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 06

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: New team members are thrown in the deep end. Boo and Lachie embark on a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 03

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: Hoppo and Evo face rescues on summer's hottest day. Newbies Matt and Noah are tested as their radio dies.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 05

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards aid surfers and chase an odd beach intruder. Australia Day brings Harrison's toughest rescue yet.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 04

Video.summary: A flasher's reported. Will and Bagus do continuous rescues. Jethro and Chase test a homemade throne in the surf.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 08

Video.summary: Max attends shark net rescue. Lifeguards handle skate park injuries and rescue struggling swimmers.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 03

Video.summary: Jesse, alone in the tower, can't assist a drowning man as all lifeguards are busy in the water.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 02

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: Corey rescues swimmers in massive waves. Trainees Ryan and Glick aim to impress in the lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 13

Video.summary: A Bondi local is found face down, unresponsive in the sand. Singlets is flocked by seagulls in the buggy.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 05

Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 12

Video.summary: Heidi Klum visits Bondi for a photoshoot. Harrison faces 3 drowning people. Surgery on a dislocated knee.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 07

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: An American tourist needs CPR after being pulled unconscious from the ocean in calm waters.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 06

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01
